pages.title: About - Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney
headings: h3: Further details
pages.text_excerpt: About - Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Skip to main content Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Join Get Involved Donate About Contact Latest News More Menu About Rushanara Ali is the Labour MP for Bethnal Green and Stepney. She was first elected in May 2010 in the constituency of Bethnal Green and Bow, having defeated George Galloway’s Respect Party. Rushanara is currently a member of the Work and Pensions Select Committee. She has previously served as the Minister for Homelessness and Democracy at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government. In opposition, she served as Shadow Minister for Investment and Small Business, Shadow Minister for Education and Young People and Shadow Minister for International Development. Rushanara has served on the Treasury Select Committee, the Communities and Local Government Committee and the Energy and Climate Change Committee. She was also the UK government’s Trade Envoy to Bangladesh and Governor of the Westminster Foundation for Democracy. Before she was elected, Rushanara was Associate Director of the Young Foundation. She has also worked at the Home Office, Foreign and Commonwealth Office and the Institute for Public Policy Research. She worked as Assistant to Lord Young of Dartington and Assistant to Oona King MP. Rushanara grew up in her constituency attending Mulberry school and Tower Hamlets College. She was the first in her family to go to university and studied Philosophy, Politics and Economics at Oxford University. Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Further details Promoted by Graham Taylor on behalf of Rushanara Ali. pages.title: Contact - Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney
headings: h2: Follow on social media
h3: Further details
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Skip to main content Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Join Get Involved Donate About Contact Latest News More Menu Contact I want to hear about the issues that are important to you. If you are my constituent and you have an issue you would like help with, please get in touch by emailing me at rushanara@rushanaraali.org or giving my office a call on 0207 219 7200 or providing your name, address, telephone number and details about your case. Surgeries : I hold regular advice surgeries in Bethnal Green and Stepney by appointment only. If you require an appointment, please mention this in your email. For diary or any other enquiries , please email rushanara.ali.mp@parliament.uk Follow on social media Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Further details Promoted by Graham Taylor on behalf of Rushanara Ali.
